Depth corrections: Cape Kri 30→40m, Cape Mansuar 25→40m, Manta Ridge 20→40m, Friwen Garden 25→35m. 18 generic source footers replaced with actual named sources.

Sufa class Satil→Sa'ar 3-class (45m not 46m); entry_type boat→shore. Balena depth 3m→9m. Legend 'intentionally sunk' claim removed (unverified). Wrecks validated: Kimon M, Cedar Pride, Sirnaka, Chrisoula K, Adantia K, Levanzo, Sha'ab Ohroob.

saba.notes: CRITICAL: Eye of the Needle description said top 'within meters of surface' — corrected, top is at 27m depth. Tent Reef Wall depth 40m→30m. Diamond Rock depth 32m→24m. Hot Springs had most hallucinated content — generic Caribbean fish replaced with confirmed site-specific species. Torrens Point 60ft swim-through tunnel and Coral Nursery added from Sea Saba.

Yukon Wreck DE-429 flagged as likely fabrication (US Navy hull number, not Canadian Navy). Sinking date 15 July→14 July 2000.

south-africa.notes: isGroup=True parent slug; only child is cape-town. 5 cape-town sites spot-checked: Shark Alley, Thomas T. Tucker, Smitswinkel Bay, Castle Rock, Clan Stewart. All prior corrections persist. last_qa_date=2026-06-30 added to spot-checked sites.

south-florida.notes: SS Inchulva built 1892 (not 1903), crew 27 corrected; coral-banded shrimp removed. SS Copenhagen depth 7.3→9.5m. Lofthus enriched with J.A. Henschien buyer, false gunports detail, lumber cargo. Tenneco Towers Hurricane Andrew unsupported claim removed; deep platform depth 200→185-205ft. Blue Heron Bridge max depth 9→6m, nudibranch claim softened to dozens, Sport Diver award corrected, sailboat position corrected. Anglins Pier Reef reef sharks downgraded to occasional; pier collapse 2022 noted. Julia Tuttle Causeway AR location corrected to Biscayne Bay (was incorrectly described as Atlantic). Deerfield Beach AR site_type wreck→reef. Breakers Reef depth corrected 42-65→50-65ft. All 12 sites validation_source replaced from generic web_research to real domains.

south-pacific.notes: isGroup=True parent slug; children (fiji, french-polynesia, tonga, vanuatu, new-caledonia, cook-islands-rarotonga) all audited in prior cycles.

sri-lanka.notes: Removed Scuba Lanka (commercial dive shop, not a site). Fabricated Carreg wreck history and Anchor Point spice-trade origin story removed. SS Conch sinking date/depth conflict documented. Gala Pita Gala reclassified reef→pinnacle; Goddamahagale entry_type shore→boat.

st-kitts-and-nevis.notes: Grid Iron's coral claim was actually describing Monkey Shoals in the source material — cross-site hallucination removed. Nag's Head/Monkey Shoals species lists replaced with actual Living Oceans Foundation survey data. Brassball Wreck and Coral Garden flagged as insufficiently sourced (left validated=true per prior repo precedent, noted in qa_notes).

st-lucia.notes: Daini Koyomaru sinking/toppling conflict (air pocket during 1996 sinking vs Hurricane Lenny 1999) documented rather than guessed; location corrected west coast not north coast; single-sourced tonnage dropped. El Pirata Shipwreck and Maria Island Reef remain unvalidated (no dive-specific sources found).

st-vincent-grenadines.notes: Removed fake domain citations that don't resolve (tobagocaysmarine.com, divetrainingmag.com, psvresort.com). Depth corrections at The Wall, New Guinea Reef, Bat Cave with conflicting-source ranges noted. No wreck sites in this destination.

sudan.notes: isGroup=true parent slug, no own data file; only child is sudan-red-sea (processed today)

sudan-red-sea.notes: CRITICAL: Gota Mesharifa's entire shark-pinnacle narrative was fabricated — it's actually Mesharifa, a shallow manta cleaning-station lagoon; reclassified wall→reef. Merlo Reef reclassified wall→pinnacle (seamount). Shaab Rumi Precontinent 2 reclassified wall→wreck (Cousteau's 1963 Conshelf II habitat remains). Blue Belt depth/diveability and Levanzo Wreck length/depth/tonnage conflicts documented. All sites bumped to Advanced+ difficulty (remote liveaboard floor).
